content: Remote agent orchestration platform table stakes: auth (token or session-based), device/node registration, persistent WebSocket bidirectional connection, heartbeat/reconnection, task dispatch to registered nodes, status/health monitoring of connected agents, role-based access. Differentiators: structured audit trails, predictive failure detection, multi-agent coordination (DAG workflows), human-in-the-loop approval gates, real-time streaming of agent state, tool/MCP integration breadth. Pattern: Gateway (WS server) + Agent (WS client daemon) + Control UI.
